languages.text: Необходимо заполучить Багряную пляску Кхейна. Для этого потребуется помощь человека с воровской сноровкой. Благо дворец полнится штрафниками-меровцами.

traits.locale_text: Необходимо заполучить Кроваворукого-в-ярости. Для этого потребуется помощь человека с воровской сноровкой. Благо дворец полнится штрафниками-меровцами.

languages.text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine must be acquired. This will require the aid of someone with a thief's dexterity. Fortunately, the palace teems with Merovian penal conscripts.
languages.original_text: Необходимо заполучить Багряную пляску Кхейна. Для этого потребуется помощь человека с воровской сноровкой. Благо дворец полнится штрафниками-меровцами.

traits.locale_text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine must be acquired. This will require the aid of someone with a thief's dexterity. Fortunately, the palace teems with Merovian penal conscripts.

The Crimson Dance of Khaine must be acquired. This will require the aid of someone with a thief's dexterity. Fortunately, the palace teems with Merovian penal conscripts.
The Crimson Dance of Khaine must be acquired. This will require the aid of someone with a thief's dexterity. Fortunately, the palace teems with Merovian penal conscripts.

languages.text: Der Blutrote Tanz von Khaine muss beschafft werden. Dazu bedarf es der Geschicklichkeit eines Diebes. Glücklicherweise wimmelt es im Palast vor merovianischen Strafsoldaten.
languages.original_text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine must be acquired. This will require the aid of someone with a thief's dexterity. Fortunately, the palace teems with Merovian penal conscripts.

traits.locale_text: Der Blutrote Tanz von Khaine muss beschafft werden. Dazu bedarf es der Geschicklichkeit eines Diebes. Glücklicherweise wimmelt es im Palast vor merovianischen Strafsoldaten.

languages.text: Il faut obtenir la Danse écarlate de Khaine. Pour y parvenir, l'aide d'un individu à la dextérité digne d'un voleur sera nécessaire. Heureusement, le palais est rempli de soldats pénaux meroviens.
languages.original_text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine must be acquired. This will require the aid of someone with a thief's dexterity. Fortunately, the palace teems with Merovian penal conscripts.

traits.locale_text: Il faut obtenir la Danse écarlate de Khaine. Pour y parvenir, l'aide d'un individu à la dextérité digne d'un voleur sera nécessaire. Heureusement, le palais est rempli de soldats pénaux meroviens.

languages.text: 必须得到凯恩的猩红之舞。这事需要找个像贼一样手脚利落的人帮忙。幸运的是，宫殿里到处都是梅罗夫的判罪兵。
languages.original_text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine must be acquired. This will require the aid of someone with a thief's dexterity. Fortunately, the palace teems with Merovian penal conscripts.

traits.locale_text: 必须得到凯恩的猩红之舞。这事需要找个像贼一样手脚利落的人帮忙。幸运的是，宫殿里到处都是梅罗夫的判罪兵。

languages.text: Es preciso obtener la Danza Carmesí de Khaine. Para ello se necesita la ayuda de un individuo con dotes para el hurto. Por suerte, el palacio está abarrotado de reclutas penales merovianos.
languages.original_text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine must be acquired. This will require the aid of someone with a thief's dexterity. Fortunately, the palace teems with Merovian penal conscripts.

traits.locale_text: Es preciso obtener la Danza Carmesí de Khaine. Para ello se necesita la ayuda de un individuo con dotes para el hurto. Por suerte, el palacio está abarrotado de reclutas penales merovianos.

languages.text: 怒りのブラッディハンドを手に入れなければならない。そのためには、盗みの技術を持った男の助けが必要だ。宮殿には立派なメロビア人がたくさんいる。
languages.original_text: The Bloody Hand of Fury must be obtained. This will require the help of a man with thieving skills. The palace is full of fine Merovians.

languages.text: Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı ele geçirilmeli. Bunun için bir hırsızın el çabukluğuna sahip birinin yardımı gerekecek. Neyse ki saray, Merovlu ceza infaz askeri kaynıyor.
languages.original_text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine must be acquired. This will require the aid of someone with a thief's dexterity. Fortunately, the palace teems with Merovian penal conscripts.
